languages.text: Капитан-интендант Дунавски не бросила Лорд-капитана сражаться с чудовищем в одиночку и лично явилась помочь.
Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski did not leave the Lord Captain to fight the monster alone and personally showed up to help.
languages.original_text: Капитан-интендант Дунавски не бросила Лорд-капитана сражаться с чудовищем в одиночку и лично явилась помочь.

traits.locale_text: Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski did not leave the Lord Captain to fight the monster alone and personally showed up to help.
Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski did not leave the Lord Captain to fight the monster alone and personally showed up to help.
Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski did not leave the Lord Captain to fight the monster alone and personally showed up to help.

languages.text: ダンフスキー艦長は、怪物と戦うために船長を一人残すことはなく、自ら現れて助けた。
languages.original_text: Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski did not leave the Lord Captain to fight the monster alone and personally showed up to help.

traits.locale_text: ダンフスキー艦長は、怪物と戦うために船長を一人残すことはなく、自ら現れて助けた。

languages.text: La capitana-intendente no dejó a{mf|l| la} Lord Capitán sol{mf|o|a} ante el monstruo e intervino personalmente para ayudar.
languages.original_text: Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski did not leave the Lord Captain to fight the monster alone and personally showed up to help.

traits.locale_text: La capitana-intendente no dejó a{mf|l| la} Lord Capitán sol{mf|o|a} ante el monstruo e intervino personalmente para ayudar.

languages.text: Captain-Quartiermeisterin Dunawski hat den Lord Captain nicht den Monstern überlassen und eilte im persönlich zu Hilfe.
languages.original_text: Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski did not leave the Lord Captain to fight the monster alone and personally showed up to help.

traits.locale_text: Captain-Quartiermeisterin Dunawski hat den Lord Captain nicht den Monstern überlassen und eilte im persönlich zu Hilfe.

languages.text: La capitaine-quartier-maître Dunawski n'a pas abandonné {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} face au monstre et est même venue lui apporter son aide.
languages.original_text: Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski did not leave the Lord Captain to fight the monster alone and personally showed up to help.

traits.locale_text: La capitaine-quartier-maître Dunawski n'a pas abandonné {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} face au monstre et est même venue lui apporter son aide.

languages.text: 军需官上尉杜纳芙斯卡并未让舰长大人独自对抗怪物，而是亲自前来助阵。
languages.original_text: Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski did not leave the Lord Captain to fight the monster alone and personally showed up to help.

traits.locale_text: 军需官上尉杜纳芙斯卡并未让舰长大人独自对抗怪物，而是亲自前来助阵。

languages.text: Levazımcı Yüzbaşı Dunawski, canavarla savaşında Lord Kaptan'ı yalnız bırakmadı ve bizzat yardıma koştu.
languages.original_text: Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski did not leave the Lord Captain to fight the monster alone and personally showed up to help.

traits.locale_text: Levazımcı Yüzbaşı Dunawski, canavarla savaşında Lord Kaptan'ı yalnız bırakmadı ve bizzat yardıma koştu.
